creator: brett@peloton.physics.montana.edu
text:
> Shouldn't the MASTER_SITE for expect be it's home site?  

Sure in theory, BUT it was moved to a separate site because, much like
imap and a number of others, the distfile often gets changed WITHOUT a
change of the version number, causing a makesum failure. 

Brett
